description: Mobile-first tap-to-flap endless runner. Tap anywhere to flap; the character falls under gravity; navigate through scrolling pipes with random gaps. Each pipe passed = +1 score. Game over on collision with pipe or ground. Cute cartoon winged character with rotated nose-up/nose-down animation. localStorage best-score. Fully Lego-composed: imports the canonical tap-to-flap entity verbatim. Touch-only via pointerdown (one-tap UX).
qualityNotes: Hand-crafted Lego-composed reference for recipe.flappy. Demonstrates: (1) inline source-copy of the tap-to-flap entity (verbatim, marker present), (2) requestAnimationFrame game loop with dt-clamped tick (prevents huge jumps if tab backgrounds), (3) DPR-aware canvas resize for crisp rendering on retina, (4) character rotation eased toward atan2(vy, 250) clamped [-60°, 90°] — gives the classic nose-up-when-flapping / nose-down-when-falling animation, (5) cartoon winged character with body/belly/eye/beak (5 ovals), (6) pipe drawing with cap shapes (pipe-shadow rectangle 4px wider, 16px tall at the gap edge — gives the classic 'pipe top' look), (7) tap anywhere on canvas to flap, (8) start-overlay with pulsing 'Start' button, (9) end-overlay with score + best + new-best announcement, (10) huge centered score during play (not chrome-y).

discriminator.reasoning: Hand-crafted by platform team to fill the tap-to-flap arcade genre gap (canonical mobile arcade pattern). Composes recipe.flappy's required Lego (entities.flappy-bird, retained as internal Lego id). AntiKeywords for doodle-jump, stack, platformer, side-scrolling-shooter, pong disambiguate from neighboring arcade genres.
